final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing 工笔重彩 long-scroll illustration of the 元宵灯会 festival in 唐代长安城.

Style/medium: needs a 工笔重彩长卷 aesthetic — exact brushwork, pigment layering, and scroll proportion are yours
Composition: must be a horizontal long-scroll (长卷) panoramic layout
Subject: must include a full panoramic view of 唐代长安城 元宵灯会 with ten-thousand lanterns (万盏花灯) illuminating the night sky
Scene/backdrop: must include 唐代长安城 at night, streets and architecture filled with festival crowds and glowing lanterns
Lighting/mood: needs a warm, luminous night-festival atmosphere — exact light diffusion and glow treatment are yours
Color palette: needs a rich, jewel-toned 重彩 direction — exact pigment choices and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a traditional silk or paper scroll surface treatment — exact texture weight and sheen are yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: 
Avoid:
